demographics.living_situation: lives independently, adult child staying overnight to help

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I walked out to the letterbox and suddenly felt dizzy, my chest felt tight, and I thought I was going to black out. My daughter is with me now.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Had a scary dizzy spell with chest tightness just now while walking outside and I'm worried I might faint.

symptom_narrative.onset: just now, while walking out to the letterbox
symptom_narrative.duration: the dizziness and chest tightness lasted about 10 minutes and then settled once I sat down and rested
symptom_narrative.character: tight feeling in my chest, and a woozy, faint feeling in my head
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that I thought I was going to black out
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on suddenly while I was walking, has been happening more with activity over the last few months
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting down and resting made both the dizziness and the chest tightness go away after about 10 minutes
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: walking or exerting myself, like going out to the letterbox
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've noticed I get puffed out more easily doing things around the house over the last few months, that's been building up gradually
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I haven't fully fainted before, but I have felt a bit dizzy on exertion a few times recently
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been scared to walk far in case I get dizzy again, so I'm not moving around as much as I used to

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: My daughter has been staying with me overnight since this happened, and she's cleared anything I could trip over at home.

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants reassurance that she can still move around her house safely and isn't about to collapse

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes events in order, mentions her daughter's presence for reassurance

access_barriers.other: frail and now avoiding walking around the house out of fear of fainting — restricted mobility since the episode
